response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, where he contributes to Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks and agentic workflows. While his AI/GenAI experience is not as explicitly deep as the role requires, his leadership in technical projects, cloud tooling, and open-source contributions suggests adaptability. His background in scalable systems and mentorship aligns well with the staff-level responsibilities, though his direct experience with RAG architectures and vector databases is less evident.
strengths: Proven leadership in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP frameworks and developer tooling.
Extensive experience with cloud platforms (AWS) and scalable systems, demonstrated in roles at re:cinq and Optilyz.
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record, including workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of deep expertise in RAG architectures or vector databases, which are core to the role.
AI/GenAI experience is primarily recent and not as prominently detailed as the 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions required.
While cloud experience is present, the resume does not highlight specific achievements in designing AI systems on major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
